_readme: Venue definitions used by the schedule, event pages and the campus map. kind: 'venue' = blue teardrop pin, 'parking' = yellow P car-park sign, 'direction' = green pin + dashed line target. IMPORTANT: coordinates are close approximations — please verify each pin in Google Maps before launch and paste exact lat/lng here.

birch.name: Birch Building — Innovation Space
birch.address: Birch Building (#35), Science Road, ANU, Acton ACT 2601

melville.name: Melville Hall
melville.address: Melville Hall (#12), University Avenue, ANU, Acton ACT 2601

fellows.name: Fellows Oval BBQ
fellows.address: Fellows Oval, Fellows Road, ANU, Acton ACT 2601

dendy.name: Dendy Cinemas Canberra
dendy.address: Level 2, North Quarter, Canberra Centre, 148 Bunda Street, Canberra ACT 2601

cbd.name: Canberra City Centre
cbd.address: Canberra City Centre, ACT 2601 — exact venues announced on each event page

parking-birch.name: Birch Building Car Park (public, ticketed)
parking-birch.address: Birch Building Precinct, off Daley Rd, ANU — closest to the Birch Building.

parking-kingsley.name: Kingsley Street Underground Car Park (public, ticketed)
parking-kingsley.address: Kingsley Street, off Barry Drive, ANU — mid-campus, closest to Melville Hall.

parking-anu-sport.name: ANU Sport Car Park (public, ticketed)
parking-anu-sport.address: ANU Sport, near Willows Oval, off North Road, ANU — closest to Birch Building.
